Off Calendar Oct-19-2021 Continued To Nov-16-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Mark Gullota, via ZOOM, for Frederick Munz, via ZOOM, Attorney-in-Fact for Hortensia Hartwig.

The court asks Mr. Gullota if Ms. Hartwig will be signing the petition. Mr. Gullota reports that Ms. Gullota's signature is an "X" and has been her signature for some time. The court advises that it has an issue with the notarized document submitted with the petition and asks if Ms. Hartwig can sign her name next to the "X". Counsel advises that he doesn't believe that she can. Mr. Gullota asks if he can sign on her behalf. The court advises Mr. Gullota to research probate codes regarding whether he can verify the petition on Ms. Hartwig's behalf.

After additional discussion, the Petition for Spousal property is continued to Nov-16-2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
